title: Bionano Genomics (NASDAQ: BNGO) details 13 optical genome mapping studies at AMP 2025
text: Bionano Genomics showcased 13 optical genome mapping studies and presentations at the Association for Molecular Pathology (AMP) 2025 annual meeting. Presentations highlighted clinical utility across multiple indications including hematologic malignancies, constitutional genetic disorders, and emerging applications. Key studies presented: analysis of OGM performance in T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (T-ALL) in pediatric populations, detection of complex structural variants missed by conventional methods, role of OGM in constitutional genetic disorder diagnosis, cell and gene therapy applications. Clinical collaborators from leading institutions presented real-world evidence demonstrating OGM's impact on patient diagnosis and treatment decisions. The conference presentations reinforce the growing clinical validation for OGM technology and position Bionano at the forefront of next-generation genome analysis. Publication momentum (28+ publications in Q1 2026) provides independent validation of technology utility. These presentations support the commercial case for OGM adoption across diagnostic laboratories.
